title: Trommsdorffia uniflora
taxonomy: Trommsdorffia uniflora is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Strelitziaceae, commonly known as the bird of paradise family. This plant is native to the eastern parts of Southern Africa, specifically in the provinces of KwaZulu-Natal and the Eastern Cape. The Trommsdorffia uniflora is further classified within the genus Trommsdorffia, which is a monotypic genus containing only this species. The plant is characterized by its unique flowers and leaves, making it a popular choice among botanists and horticulturists. Trommsdorffia uniflora is also known for its ability to thrive in a variety of environments, from shaded to full sun.
